name: simple-hono-app
summary: A minimal Hono-based web service exposing a greeting, health check, and user lookup endpoints on Node.js.

modules.name: greeting
modules.summary: Root greeting capability that returns a welcome message.

modules.name: users
modules.summary: User identity lookup capability returning a user representation by id.

modules.name: infrastructure
modules.summary: Cross-cutting technical plumbing: HTTP server bootstrapping, port configuration, TypeScript tooling, and dependency management.
